error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Cloudflare API.
error.gateway_not_found: Gateway not found. Check your account ID and gateway ID.

reauth_confirm.description: Your API token is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.

data_description.account_id: Your Cloudflare account ID, found in the dashboard URL.
data_description.gateway_id: The AI Gateway ID. Use 'default' for the auto-created gateway.
data_description.cf_api_token: API token with AI Gateway permissions.

user.description: Set up Cloudflare AI Gateway to access 20+ AI providers through a single integration.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add models while the gateway is not loaded.

error.model_not_found: Model not found on Cloudflare Workers AI. Check the model name for typos.

user.description: What type of model do you want to add?

menu_options.chat:
Chat model
Conversation agent + AI data tasks via any provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
menu_options.image:
Image model
Image generation via Cloudflare Workers AI

data_description.provider: The AI provider to route requests through (e.g., openai, anthropic, google-ai-studio).
data_description.chat_model: The model name at the provider (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet-4-5).
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response

data_description.cache_ttl: How long to cache responses in Cloudflare AI Gateway (in seconds). Leave empty to disable caching.

data_description.image_model: The Workers AI image generation model to use.
data_description.image_width: Width of generated images in pixels.
data_description.image_height: Height of generated images in pixels.
data_description.image_steps: Number of inference steps. More steps = higher quality but slower.
